tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "UbuntuComputer-egress-deny"
set srcintf "Gi0/0"
set dstintf "Port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 0
set name "UbuntuComputer-web-allow"
set srcintf "Gi0/0"
set dstintf "Port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy"}
